< Home >

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LightBulletins.LightBulletin

<para> DEPRECATED Use <see cref="T:Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LightBulletins.LightBulletinV2" /> LightBulletinV2 instead. </para> Represents a light bulletin item.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
LightBulletinId

The unique id for for the light bulletin, in scope of a site (itslearning customer).

 integer

None.
Text

Descriptive text for the light bulletin. It's intended to be a plain text, so should be encoded.

 string

None.
EmbedUrl

A link to 3rd party content, which can be embedded or inserted as OGP.

 string

None.
AllowComments

Defines whether comments creation is allowed for current light bulletin. If there are some comments already, they can still be seen.

 boolean

None.
ElementLinks

The collection of element links attached to the light bulletin.

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.ElementLink

None.
